project_type: Python Harbor Terminal-Bench debugging task - AST-based code transformation engine
build_system: stdlib-only Python, Dockerfile for containerized execution
verification_instructions: 1. Run system with bugs (NOP): 4 easy tests pass, 6 fail. 2. Apply repair script (Oracle): all 10 tests pass. 3. System never crashes - always produces structurally valid output.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Output files generated at runtime: /app/runtime/output/transform_report.json and /app/runtime/output/rewrite_manifest.json
setup_instructions: Docker build from environment/Dockerfile, COPY runtime/ /app/runtime/
environment_constraints: No external dependencies - stdlib only. Custom .src mini-language parsed by the engine.
contribution_requirements: No BUG/FIXME/TODO/HACK comments. No word 'pipeline'. Must include 'system-wide' in instruction.md. Field names in schemas must match test assertions exactly. All paths in instruction.md are absolute (/app/runtime/...).
key_patterns: Pattern from existing raft-election task: configparser for config, string-replacement repair script, graduated test levels (easy/medium/hard), hash-based verification, Bug E invisible until Bug B fixed (import-time cache), vague error messages in medium tests, structural ordering hints in hard tests
directory_structure: environment/ (Dockerfile + runtime/), runtime/ has config/, data/, output/, and Python modules. tests/ has test.sh + pytest file. solution/ has solve.sh + repair script.
